observations.surface: make release-evidence-converge, release-smoke-full, raw_registry_preflight, wiki_lint, release-auto-promotion-ready
observations.problem: Clean Stage 3 authority still cannot be proven by the full convergence lane because release-evidence-converge stops in release-smoke-full on raw registry shard gaps and wiki_lint function-budget candidates.
observations.why_it_matters: Until those lower clean-lane issues are repaired, auto-promotion remains blocked by source-tree coherence accepted risk, learning revalidation due, and clean/conditional attention even after the Stage 3 duplicate release-gate diagnosis is removed.
observations.automation_candidate: Add or document a focused pre-convergence repair lane that refreshes raw-registry shard evidence and resolves function-budget candidates before rerunning release-evidence-converge.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated: release-smoke now runs raw_registry_preflight and wiki_lint in release-archive profile for corpus-free public source ZIPs, while keeping public Python function-budget review candidates visible. Remaining learning, accepted-risk, gate-attention, and source-tree-coherence blockers are surfaced by release-auto-promotion-preflight/preseal before Stage 3.

observations.problem: Stage 3 diagnostics still expose gate_attention_count and learning_claim_blocking_family_count inside the accepted_risk object, even though operator summary deliberately separates them from accepted-risk counts.
observations.why_it_matters: The current names are strict enough for safety but can make operators read gate or learning attention as accepted risk, recreating part of the pass-vs-attention ambiguity this staged workflow is meant to remove.
observations.automation_candidate: Split Stage 3 operator diagnostics into accepted_risk, gate_attention, and learning_claim sections while preserving strict-zero blockers for unattended promotion.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated: release-auto-promotion-ready now reports accepted_risk, gate_attention, and learning_claim as separate operator diagnostic groups while preserving strict-zero blockers for unattended promotion.
